#endif
{
    0.00977058709f, -0.0538426712f, -0.00199691276f, 0.0869755596f, -0.0080394363f, 0.0126592424f, -0.0377014652f, -0.0189049002f,
    -0.0400554799f, 0.0637338981f, 0.0415044352f, 0.00588583108f, 0.0490244441f, 0.0638819337f, 0.00283157919f, -0.00489384122f,
    -0.00574560463f, -0.00355872512f, -0.000889663468f, 0.0629440844f, -0.0595789924f, -0.003995582f, 0.0658142865f, 0.0569166057f,
    -0.00902048685f, -0.0356438495f, 0.0443479419f, 0.0567873456f, 0.0495827012f, 0.00810940377f, 0.085424237f, 0.0f,
};
#ifdef __CUDA_ARCH__
alignas(16) static __device__ constexpr float LAM_OUT_W[128] =
#else
alignas(16) inline constexpr float LAM_OUT_W[128] =
#endif
{
    0.130974263f, -0.0814659745f, -0.0230156071f, -0.0765303001f, 0.0203293618f, 0.0829127803f, -0.031677179f, 0.12119592f,
    -0.0257856324f, 0.116549015f, 0.121078797f, -0.00936865155f, -0.0180981867f, -0.0244918931f, -0.0394665264f, 0.00160489522f,
    -0.0729485005f, -0.0590772517f, -0.00878831651f, 0.0878090486f, -0.0739325881f, 0.110325187f, -0.0259745009f, -0.0106050568f,
    0.0829683691f, -0.0298909005f, -0.0737897083f, 0.00730164116f, 0.0831725299f, 0.0544152446f, -0.0605399571f, 0.088387683f,
    0.0886408538f, -0.0259400792f, -0.122659519f, 0.0826875418f, 0.120309524f, 0.0731075853f, 0.135517657f, -0.0629631653f,
    -0.0688671172f, -0.058950454f, -0.0472584777f, 0.06351915f, -0.0702174455f, 0.0485625975f, -0.106973931f, -0.0721028671f,
    -0.0117002325f, -0.0843224302f, 0.074256219f, -0.0968794078f, -0.00326338294f, -0.0360854715f, 0.0445710383f, -0.000138739342f,
    0.112507872f, -0.00483236602f, 0.0299331136f, 0.104855634f, -0.0607971475f, -0.0739413053f, 0.0418062769f, 0.0258006249f,
    0.00906733982f, -0.00234217173f, -0.0191483162f, -0.037058197f, -0.0617572106f, 0.0730702654f, -0.0311051663f, 0.0719675347f,
    0.0457390584f, -0.0119595388f, -0.111263774f, -0.0211311076f, 0.0460245162f, -0.0210962519f, 0.0664910004f, -0.10498821f,
    -0.146640196f, -0.0839108899f, 0.0846975669f, -0.0684677586f, 0.014380578f, 0.0635923147f, -0.0250524599f, -0.144486412f,
    0.0462953858f, 0.00095538859f, -0.0344623625f, -0.0826681107f, -0.087639831f, 0.0523654856f, -0.0571093708f, -0.0368996337f,
    0.0363099985f, 0.0639348626f, -0.118288256f, -0.113529205f, 0.0687856376f, -0.0313401669f, 0.0304749142f, -0.0576983914f,
    0.0327170342f, -0.0824873298f, 0.0735589117f, 0.0191282872f, -0.137859464f, -0.0892018303f, -0.0153886024f, 0.0789597705f,
    -0.0679556653f, -0.0532100648f, 0.0212634709f, 0.00519718742f, 0.0440416262f, 0.0419897251f, -0.0354070701f, 0.00749218371f,
    0.00740515301f, 0.0706262812f, -0.123802766f, -0.0237848572f, 0.0301716067f, -0.101145826f, -0.0781980827f, -0.0510988757f,
};

template<bool ReLU>
FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE void AddBlockWidth(const float* __restrict__ xin, float* __restrict__ xout, const float* __restrict__ W, const float* __restrict__ B) 
{
    float tmp[WIDTH];
    tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(xin, tmp, 0, 0, W, B);
    CUDA_UNROLL
    for (int i = 0; i < WIDTH; ++i) 
    {
        xout[i] = xin[i] + tmp[i];
    }
}

FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE void RGBEncode(const float* __restrict__ in3, float* __restrict__ outK) 
{
    const float I = sqrtf(0.2126f*in3[0] + 0.7152f*in3[1] + 0.0722f*in3[2]);
    //const float inP3[3] = {sqrtf(in3[0]), sqrtf(in3[1]), sqrtf(in3[2])};        
    constexpr int RGB_SIN_WIDTH = (WIDTH / 6) * 2;
    float s[RGB_SIN_WIDTH * 3];
    // sincos: s = [sin(2piR), cos(2piR), sin(4piR), cos(4piR), ..., sin(2piG), cos(2piG), sin(4piG), cos(4piG), ..., sin(2piB), cos(2piB), sin(4piB), cos(4piB)]
    {
        //constexpr float TWO_PI = 6.28318530717958647692f;
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int k = 0; k < RGB_SIN_WIDTH/2; ++k)
        {
            const float phase = in3[0] * CUDART_PI_F * static_cast<float>(k + 1);
            sincosf(phase, &s[k], &s[k + RGB_SIN_WIDTH/2]);
        }
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int k = 0; k < RGB_SIN_WIDTH/2; ++k)
        {
            const float phase = in3[1] * CUDART_PI_F * static_cast<float>(k + 1);
            sincosf(phase, &s[k + RGB_SIN_WIDTH], &s[k + RGB_SIN_WIDTH/2 + RGB_SIN_WIDTH]);
        }
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int k = 0; k < RGB_SIN_WIDTH/2; ++k)
        {
            const float phase = in3[2] * CUDART_PI_F * static_cast<float>(k + 1);
            sincosf(phase, &s[k + RGB_SIN_WIDTH * 2], &s[k + RGB_SIN_WIDTH/2 + RGB_SIN_WIDTH * 2]);
        }
    }
    float h[WIDTH];
    //tensor::LinearRowMajor<3, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*ReLU=*/true, /*Opt=*/true>(inP3, h, 0, 0, RGB_IN_W, RGB_IN_B);
    tensor::LinearRowMajor<RGB_SIN_WIDTH * 3, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*ReLU=*/true, /*Opt=*/true>(s, h, 0, 0, RGB_IN_W, RGB_IN_B);
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK0_W, RGB_BLK0_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK1_W, RGB_BLK1_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK2_W, RGB_BLK2_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK3_W, RGB_BLK3_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK4_W, RGB_BLK4_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK5_W, RGB_BLK5_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK6_W, RGB_BLK6_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, KERNEL, /*bBias=*/false, /*bReLU=*/false, /*Opt=*/true>(h, outK, 0, 0, RGB_OUT_W, nullptr);
    CUDA_UNROLL
    for (int i = 0; i < KERNEL; ++i)
    {
        outK[i] *= I;
    }
}

FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE void LambdaEncode(const float* __restrict__ in1, float* __restrict__ outK) 
{
    const float x = fminf(fmaxf((in1[0] - 360.0f) / (780.0f - 360.0f), 0.0f), 1.0f);

    float h[WIDTH];
    // sincos: h = [sin(2pix), cos(2pix), sin(4pix), cos(4pix), ...]
    {
        //constexpr float TWO_PI = 6.28318530717958647692f;
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int k = 0; k < WIDTH/2; ++k)
        {
            const float phase = x * CUDART_PI_F * static_cast<float>(k + 1);
            sincosf(phase, &h[k], &h[k + WIDTH/2]);
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK0_W, LAM_BLK0_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK1_W, LAM_BLK1_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK2_W, LAM_BLK2_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK3_W, LAM_BLK3_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK4_W, LAM_BLK4_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK5_W, LAM_BLK5_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK6_W, LAM_BLK6_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, KERNEL, /*bBias=*/false, /*bReLU=*/false, /*Opt=*/true>(h, outK, 0, 0, LAM_OUT_W, nullptr);
}
    
FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE float SpectralInteract(const float* __restrict__ RGBKernel, const float* __restrict__ LambdaKernel) 
{
    float acc = 0.0f;
    CUDA_UNROLL
    for (int i = 0; i < KERNEL; ++i) 
    {
        acc = fmaf(RGBKernel[i], LambdaKernel[i], acc);
    }
    // sigmoid
    //return 1.0f / (1.0f + expf(-acc));
    // softclamp01_exp
    return 1.0f - expf(-fmaxf(acc, 0.0f));
}

#ifdef __CUDA_ARCH__
alignas(16) static __device__ constexpr float gtTest[100] =
#else
alignas(16) inline constexpr float gtTest[100] =
#endif
{
    0.9814201f, 0.814983308f, 0.696373165f, 0.419843018f, 0.639842451f, 0.447825313f, 0.470443308f, 0.957753599f, 0.0797843337f, 0.0670505762f, 0.138586521f, 0.422500372f, 0.116933048f, 0.290756822f, 0.852324724f, 0.907333612f, 0.289537668f, 0.268205702f, 0.48896575f, 0.838336587f, 0.365248501f, 0.793501258f, 0.573920846f, 0.31570822f, 0.385381997f, 0.381018519f, 0.35807234f, 0.258886397f, 0.621708393f, 0.768066168f, 0.905202806f, 0.631951392f, 0.632886171f, 0.113305151f, 0.690979898f, 0.449583292f, 0.575235367f, 0.948944569f, 0.724226236f, 0.15072912f, 0.282960653f, 0.536297321f, 0.567473888f, 0.687609434f, 0.185767293f, 0.153106809f, 0.359125137f, 0.709331632f, 0.884714246f, 0.40621525f, 0.127685428f, 0.818425775f, 0.0923455954f, 0.341793716f, 0.710589647f, 0.29574275f, 0.551521778f, 0.54596889f, 0.460850716f, 0.334816277f, 0.450153828f, 0.720950365f, 0.945381403f, 0.550363898f, 0.51970011f, 0.404944599f, 0.113682747f, 0.312549055f, 0.421299219f, 0.349268198f, 0.511183143f, 0.844360471f, 0.466975212f, 0.444428742f, 0.0289047956f, 0.673261404f, 0.130836129f, 0.432129085f, 0.682460129f, 0.714409649f, 0.275880396f, 0.348020554f, 0.386872709f, 0.599460959f, 0.277692854f, 0.323517799f, 0.335856736f, 0.691558182f, 0.232017636f, 0.624856174f, 0.474453986f, 0.481741011f, 0.617284954f, 0.453002095f, 0.667750597f, 0.455313265f, 0.83810848f, 0.91939342f, 0.508124232f, 0.251700163f
};

FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE void SelfTestSimple()
{
    float mse = 0.0f;
    for (int i = 0; i < 100; ++i)
    {
        const float rgb3[3] = { inputTest[0][i], inputTest[1][i], inputTest[2][i] };
        const float lam1[1] = { inputTest[3][i] };

        float k1[KERNEL];
        float k2[KERNEL];

        RGBEncode(rgb3, k1);
        LambdaEncode(lam1, k2);
        const float pred = SpectralInteract(k1, k2);

        const float err = pred - gtTest[i];
        mse += err * err;

        std::printf("[test #%02d] pred=%.9f  gt=%.9f  err=%.9e\n", i, pred, gtTest[i], err);
    }
    mse /= 100.0f;    std::printf("[test] MSE=%.9e\n", mse);
}
}
